description_long: This is a black baseball cap featuring a structured, rounded crown and a curved brim. The front panel displays a prominent embroidered logo with the text 'Red Bull BC One' in white, accompanied by stylized wing graphics. The cap appears to be made from a woven fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with reinforced stitching along the seams and brim. The back of the cap includes an adjustable strap with a small opening, typical of snapback or strapback designs. The surface has a matte finish, and the overall construction suggests durability and comfort for everyday urban wear. The cap is designed to fit snugly on the head, providing shade and style.
description: A black baseball cap with a curved brim and a prominent 'Red Bull BC One' embroidered logo on the front. It features an adjustable strap at the back and a matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Red Bull BC One' logo and the curved brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, rounded crown and the curvature of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the adjustable strap and back opening.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the unadorned side panel and the brim's profile.
